title: Truth about Ritsuko rampage revealed
wikitext:
[]: Truth about Ritsuko rampage revealed!             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sat Apr 16, 2005 9:47 pm You may have heard Shin-seiki or Reichu mention that Shin-seiki has been working on a essay that will blow the lid of of Ritsuko's true motivations in Ep. 23, 24, & EOE. Well, for the last 17 days he has been posting his ground-breaking revelations here: http://www.animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=170703 It just occured to me "Hey, I don't think theres a link to this over on Eva Monkey's forum yet!" So here it is. The BIG revelation is on page 11, but read the set-up on the earlier pages. (He still has about 3 more scenes to analyze before he's finished.)

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Apr 17, 2005 3:32 am Alright the guy's genius!

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Sun Apr 17, 2005 6:57 am holy shit this stuff is quite amazing... this takes some talent man - or just a serious case of NGE obsessivness - but hey that involves all of us. ok so just maybe anno didn't actually make such an effort to cram that massive shit-load of info. into every single line and image. this must be taken into account. i love this, but anno may not deserve all of the credit for what has been decided to reside in the show. but then again, maybe he does. until i meet the guy, i will never know... oh yeah and shin-seiki, ...your my idol :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Sun Apr 17, 2005 2:58 pm :shock: ... BRILLIANT...!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Apr 17, 2005 3:45 pm Profound, is the word we are looking for here. *tips hat*

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Sun Apr 17, 2005 4:11 pm If not, then let's allow Ritsuko's own words spell it out: "I only needed to think of him and I could endure any kind of humiliation! I didn't care what happened to my body! and (from #24') "Why don't you just have your way with my body?! Like you did that time!" . . . . They raped her... I don't mean the Committee personally, of course. They're not physically present here, they're just holograms. I mean they ordered one of their goon squads to kidnap, rape, and abuse her, for God-only-knows how long, before what we see going on "on camera" with her standing before the Committee.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Sun Apr 17, 2005 8:13 pm Exactly what question is this answering?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Apr 17, 2005 9:13 pm What made Ritsuko snap and turn on gendo, I think. The theory is that Seele used rape during her intorgation. As always Shin-seiki does his home work but to be honist I didn't read the entire thing as its LONG. If its possable for some one to give use a summary that would be great.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 18, 2005 12:17 am Read it. It's worth it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Mon Apr 18, 2005 1:33 am Yeah, I offered arround 40 minutes yesterday - but I did some other stuff at the same time too :) Took a break every now and then to clear my thoughts...
